title: heliotropium marifolium var. bracteatum
intro: Heliotropium marifolium var. bracteatum, also known as heliotrope, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as wounds, skin issues, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of heliotrope include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and other respiratory infections. Heliotrope can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
